paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.69, with a 9.23% increase from the prior close and a 25.47% decrease over the last 21 sessions. There have been 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Fermi Inc. has recently announced its second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, with the call scheduled for August 13, 2026. Another recent news article discussed the company's stock tumbling more than 28% in after-hours trading, citing a filing with the SEC that stated CEO Toby Neugebauer had left the company as of April 17, 2026.

There have been various SEC filings from Fermi Inc., including a recent SCHEDULE 13G filing and multiple 8-K filings, one of which disclosed the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There has been one Form 4 filing and no Form 144 filings. Insider activity includes the resignation of director Miles Everson, effective July 10, 2026.
